# Syntrex LLC

> Syntrex designs and builds your entire digital presence: website, ecommerce, AI tools, content, automation, and strategy. Everything a big agency builds, without the big agency cost. Syntrex serves companies across industries, worldwide, with a core leadership team backed by a network of hundreds of specialists. Every system is built from scratch, custom to the business, and handed over ready to run. No templates.

## Company Details

- Name: Syntrex LLC
- Type: Custom digital agency (website, ecommerce, AI tools, content, automation, strategy)
- Headquarters: 513 Main Street, Windermere, FL 34786, United States
- Email: henry@syntrexio.com
- Website: https://syntrexio.com
- Founded by: Henry Bello
- Service area: Worldwide
- Pricing: Custom quotes only. No fixed tiers. One-time project builds and monthly retainers available. Every quote is free and agreed before work starts.
- Key differentiators: Faster than a traditional agency, at a price that makes sense. Built from scratch, not templates. Systems are handed over ready to run.

## Services

1. [AI Chatbots](https://syntrexio.com/services/ai-chatbots.html) - qualify leads, book appointments, answer questions 24/7
2. [Lead Generation & Growth](https://syntrexio.com/services/lead-generation.html) - capture, score, and follow up with leads automatically
3. [Ecommerce & Online Stores](https://syntrexio.com/services/ecommerce.html) - full stores with checkout, payments, inventory, shipping
4. [Workflow Automation](https://syntrexio.com/services/workflow-automation.html) - follow-ups, invoicing, onboarding, data entry
5. [Custom AI Tools](https://syntrexio.com/services/custom-ai-tools.html) - proposal generators, quote builders, intake forms, dashboards
6. [System Integration](https://syntrexio.com/services/system-integration.html) - connect calendar, email, CRM, forms, databases
7. [Website Design & Development](https://syntrexio.com/services/website-design.html) - custom sites built to convert
8. [Brand & Digital Presence](https://syntrexio.com/services/brand-digital-presence.html) - full digital launch: website, social, email, content
9. [AI Content & Social Media](https://syntrexio.com/services/ai-content.html) - content, images, presentations, scheduling in your brand voice
10. [AI Strategy & Consulting](https://syntrexio.com/services/ai-strategy.html) - operations audit and automation roadmap
11. [Reporting & Analytics](https://syntrexio.com/services/reporting-analytics.html) - dashboards and automated reports
12. [AI Business Planning](https://syntrexio.com/services/ai-business-planning.html) - business plans, projections, market analysis

## Pricing

Every project gets a custom quote. No fixed tiers or packages. One-time project builds and monthly retainers are available. Every quote is free and agreed before work starts.

## Real Clients & Case Studies

- HALT! Fire (industrial fire suppression): built full sales automation system, saved 10+ hours of manual work per week
- Doughbrik's Wavers (CPG snack brand): built internal automation tools, 3x faster workflows

- Henry Bello, Founder, CEO and Lead Developer
- Sofia Weeden, Co-Founder and CFO
- Alexander Ohmer, Head of Operations
- Ciana Bello, Director of Marketing and Social Media
